purpose: God-file entry point: CLI flag parsing, dual-mode dispatch (TUI vs channel-fetch), service wiring, and all adapter/helper types

entry_points: Graceful shutdown on SIGINT via signal.NotifyContext
store.Close() called on exit via defer
Fatalf on any startup failure — never partial initialization

config: YAML config file (default: config.yaml) with telegram.api_id, api_hash, session_file, storage.db_path
SQLite database at cfg.Storage.DBPath (created by storage.Open)
Readable YAML file at the given path

cross_scope_touchpoints.surface: opens SQLite store; reads/writes channels, messages, sync state via Store interface
creates client, authenticates, resolves channels, fetches messages
creates TelegramFetcher and Service; delegates all-source and filtered refresh in TUI mode
creates source Registry; iterates cfg.Sources to register telegram/rss/reddit/hackernews sources
creates LLM client (Ollama or OpenRouter) and summarizer.Service; calls SummarizeUnsummarized or SummarizeUnsummarizedForChannels
creates tui.App with store and options; runs bubbletea program; implements tui.RefreshService and tui.SummarizeService interfaces

invariants: LLM validation is gated on cfg.LLM.Provider != '' — an unconfigured LLM section is valid; the system runs without summarization capability
risks: storeMessages inserts messages one-by-one in a loop with no batch operation — O(N) round-trips to SQLite for each fetch
ensureSourceChannel silently swallows DB errors (log.Printf only) — if channel creation fails, the source will have no DB record, but the TUI will proceed anyway
The --summarize flag accepts N days but the value is never used: SummarizeUnsummarized processes all unsummarized messages regardless of the N value
storeChannel uses the channel username as the Title field with a comment 'We could enhance this by fetching actual title' — display names in the TUI will show raw usernames like @durov
patterns: registryRefreshAdapter does in-memory name-set filtering of sources for RefreshFiltered — the filtering is O(N) against the full source list per call
OpenRouterConfig struct is retained as a migration source only; it is never used downstream after Load() applies the migration to LLMConfig
